shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "if [ -d node_modules/next/dist/docs ]; then find node_modules/next/dist/docs -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#"'^#DOC #'"'; else echo 'NO_NEXT_DOCS'; fi"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/01-getting-started/03-layouts-and-pages.mdx && printf '\\n---DOC---\\n' && sed -n '1,240p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/01-getting-started/10-error-handling.mdx && printf '\\n---DOC---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/01-getting-started/15-route-handlers.mdx && printf '\\n---DOC---\\n' && sed -n '1,240p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/01-getting-started/18-upgrading.mdx"

/bin/bash -lc 'for f in pages/_app.js pages/_document.js pages/_error.js pages/404.js pages/index.js pages/blog/index.js pages/blog/[id].js pages/api/posts/index.js pages/api/posts/[id].js components/AppProvider.js styles/globals.css next.config.ts tsconfig.json; do echo "===== $f"; sed -n '"'1,240p' \""'$f"; done'
/bin/bash -lc "find app components lib pages -maxdepth 4 \\( -type f -o -type d \\) | sort"
